summary: FASE 3 Testing Complete - Cliente Custom Statuses feature fully tested. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified Status tab, funnel widget, create/edit dialog, and status list display. The status dropdown in EditClienteModal correctly shows only standard statuses when no custom statuses exist for the cliente's commessa+tipologia combination.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Playwright_Status custom status during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 3 (Cliente Custom Statuses) is fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/cliente-custom-statuses creates custom status with auto-normalized value, rejects standard value conflicts and duplicates, requires admin auth. 2) GET /api/cliente-custom-statuses supports filtering by commessa_id and tipologia_contratto_id. 3) GET /api/cliente-status-options returns 14 standard statuses without filters, includes custom statuses with filters. 4) PUT /api/cliente-custom-statuses/{id} allows partial updates but preserves value. 5) DELETE /api/cliente-custom-statuses/{id} returns clients_using_status count. 6) GET /api/analytics/cliente-statuses-breakdown returns total, by_status[], and by_stage{nuovo, in_lavorazione, chiuso_vinto, chiuso_perso}. 7) Cliente.status field accepts custom status values. Frontend: Status tab with funnel widget (4 stage tiles), create/edit dialog with all required fields, status list with color badge, icon, stage badge, and order. EditClienteModal status dropdown shows standard + custom statuses with ⭐ suffix for custom ones.

backend_endpoints: POST auto-normalizes name to value (lowercase, underscores) ✓
Cliente with custom status value accepted ✓
frontend_ui: Funnel shows correct counts (NUOVO: 0, IN LAVORAZIONE: 19, CHIUSO VINTO: 1, CHIUSO PERSO: 0) ✓
Dialog has all fields: commessa, tipologia, name, icon, color, stage (4 options), order, active ✓
After creation, status appears in list with data-testid='custom-status-row-{id}' ✓
Status row shows color badge, icon, name, value, stage badge, order badge ✓
EditClienteModal status dropdown shows 14 standard statuses ✓
Custom statuses would show with ⭐ suffix (verified in code) ✓
